expected.behavior: Identifies the actual ceiling: per-instance pool size times autoscaled instance count exceeds Postgres max_connections — autoscaling multiplied the pools

results.judge_reason: The response correctly diagnoses the pool×instances ceiling, recommends a connection pooler as the structural fix, explains why raising max_connections loses the race, and ties it to stateless/scaling-ceiling design rules while avoiding all anti-behaviors.
